'''javuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fock|fock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fock|fock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævivith|jævivith]] || [[word:jævivij|jævivij]] || [[word:jævivish|jævivish]] || [[word:jævivi|jævivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvuvuth|javuvuvuth]] || [[word:javuvuvuj|javuvuvuj]] || [[word:javuvuvush|javuvuvush]] || [[word:javuvuvu|javuvuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javuvuth|javuvuth]] || [[word:javuvuj|javuvuj]] || [[word:javuvush|javuvush]] || [[word:javuvu|javuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufvuth|javufvuth]] || [[word:javufvuj|javufvuj]] || [[word:javufvush|javufvush]] || [[word:javufvuf|javufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javuvuthu|javuvuthu]] || [[word:javuvuju|javuvuju]] || [[word:javuvushu|javuvushu]] || [[word:javuvuku|javuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javuvuth|javuvuth]] || [[word:javuvuj|javuvuj]] || [[word:javuvush|javuvush]] || [[word:javuvu|javuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javuvuthul|javuvuthul]] || [[word:javuvujul|javuvujul]] || [[word:javuvushul|javuvushul]] || [[word:javuvukul|javuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javuvuthuthu|javuvuthuthu]] || [[word:javuvujuju|javuvujuju]] || [[word:javuvushushu|javuvushushu]] || [[word:javuvuku|javuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javuvuthun|javuvuthun]] || [[word:javuvujun|javuvujun]] || [[word:javuvushun|javuvushun]] || [[word:javuvukun|javuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javuvuthuoro|javuvuthuoro]] || [[word:javuvujuoro|javuvujuoro]] || [[word:javuvushuoro|javuvushuoro]] || [[word:javuvukuoro|javuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
